authors: T. Sumiyoshi, N. Kuroki, and H. Mori
title: Electronic-Structure Informatics Guided Identification of Actinide/Lanthanide Selectivity Factors

summary.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクスを用いて、アクチノイド／ランタノイド選択性を支配する配位子の電子的・構造的因子を特定した。
summary.en: Electronic-structure informatics identifies factors governing actinide/lanthanide selectivity.

pillar.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクス

authors: N. Ozawa, N. Kuroki, and H. Mori
title: Ligand-Induced Electronic Response Enables Predictive QM/MM Simulations

summary.ja: 配位子が周囲の電子状態に及ぼす応答を指標として、QM/MM計算の量子領域を客観的かつ予測的に決定する方法を提案した。
summary.en: A ligand-induced electronic-response framework for predictive definition of QM regions in QM/MM simulations.

pillar.ja: 複雑系量子化学

authors: M. Nogamida and H. Mori
title: Quantum Chemical Insights into the Initial Reaction Pathways Governing the Self-Ignition of Hypergolic Ionic Liquids with H₂O₂

summary.ja: ハイパーゴリックイオン液体と過酸化水素の自己着火を支配する初期反応経路を、量子化学計算により明らかにした。
summary.en: Quantum-chemical analysis of the initial reaction pathways governing self-ignition of hypergolic ionic liquids with hydrogen peroxide.

pillar.ja: 自律型反応探索

authors: K. Motoki and H. Mori
title: A cooperative proton-relay pathway in imide racemization: An electronic-structure perspective

summary.ja: イミド化合物のラセミ化を促進する協同的プロトンリレー経路を、電子構造の観点から解明した。
summary.en: An electronic-structure analysis reveals a cooperative proton-relay pathway governing imide racemization.

pillar.ja: 自律型反応探索

authors: K. Motoki and H. Mori
title: Orbital-Isotopic Modulation of Stereoelectronic Interactions

summary.ja: 同位体置換が分子構造と軌道相互作用を変化させる機構を、核量子効果を含む電子状態計算から解析した。
summary.en: Analysis of isotopic modulation of stereoelectronic interactions from nuclear-quantum and electronic-structure perspectives (submitted May 18, 2026; under review).

pillar.ja: Beyond Born-Oppenheimer 理論

authors: R. Suzuki and H. Mori
title: Acidity Prediction in Arbitrary Solvents: Machine Learning Based on Semiempirical Molecular Orbital Calculation
journal: The Journal of Physical Chemistry A

summary.ja: 半経験的分子軌道計算から得られる電子状態記述子と機械学習を組み合わせ、多様な溶媒中の酸性度を予測する手法を構築した。
summary.en: Machine learning informed by semiempirical molecular orbital calculations predicts acidity in arbitrary solvents.

pillar.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクス

authors: K. Motoki and H. Mori
title: Electronic Insights into the Role of Nuclear Quantum Effects in Proton Transfer Reactions of Nucleobase Pairs

summary.ja: 核量子効果が核酸塩基対のプロトン移動障壁と電子状態を変化させ、生成物の存在比にも大きな影響を及ぼすことを明らかにした。
summary.en: Electronic-structure analysis of nuclear quantum effects in proton transfer reactions of nucleobase pairs.

pillar.ja: Beyond Born-Oppenheimer 理論

authors: D. Goto, Y. Kanebako, K. Takashima, N. Kuroki, and H. Mori
title: Realizing Ultrafine Color Tuning of Organic Electronics Materials by Electronic State Informatics
journal: The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters

summary.ja: 電子状態記述子と機械学習を用いて、有機エレクトロニクス材料の色調を精密に予測・設計する方法を示した。
summary.en: Electronic-state informatics enables ultrafine color tuning of organic electronic materials.

pillar.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクス

authors: K. Motoki and H. Mori
title: Beyond Born–Oppenheimer Pharmaceutical Quantum Chemistry of Thalidomide Analogs and Deuterium Substituents

summary.ja: サリドマイド類縁体と重水素置換体を対象に、核量子効果が立体反転と電子状態に及ぼす影響を解析し、薬理作用や安全性評価に関わる同位体効果の可能性を示した。
summary.en: Beyond-Born–Oppenheimer pharmaceutical quantum chemistry of thalidomide analogs and deuterated substituents.

pillar.ja: Beyond Born-Oppenheimer 理論

authors: D. Goto and H. Mori
title: Reconciling Color Purity and Redox Potential in Electrochromic Materials via Electronic-State-Informed Molecular Design

summary.ja: 電子状態に基づく分子設計により、エレクトロクロミック材料の色純度と酸化還元電位を両立する設計指針を示した。
summary.en: Electronic-state-informed molecular design reconciles color purity and redox potential.

pillar.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクス

authors: D. Goto and H. Mori
title: Avoiding Photocyclized Degradation of Electrochromic Materials Based on Quantum Chemical Molecular Design
journal: The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters

summary.ja: 光環化によるエレクトロクロミック材料の劣化機構を量子化学的に解析し、劣化を抑制する分子設計指針を提案した。
summary.en: Quantum-chemical molecular design avoids photocyclized degradation in electrochromic materials.

pillar.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクス

authors: M. Nogamida, N. Kuroki, and H. Mori
title: Effect of Anion Electronic State on the Hypergolic Ionic Liquids’ Reaction Pathways
journal: Journal of the Combustion Society of Japan

summary.ja: ハイパーゴリックイオン液体のアニオン電子状態が、酸化剤との初期反応経路と反応性を左右する機構を整理した。
summary.en: An invited overview of how anion electronic states affect reaction pathways of hypergolic ionic liquids.

pillar.ja: 自律型反応探索

authors: S. Watabe, N. Kuroki, and H. Mori
title: COSMO-RS Exploration of Highly CO₂-Selective Hydrogen-Bonded Binary Liquid Absorbents under Humid Conditions: Role of Trace Ionic Species

summary.ja: COSMO-RS計算により、湿潤条件下でも高いCO₂選択性を示す二成分吸収液と、微量イオン種の役割を明らかにした。
summary.en: COSMO-RS exploration of highly CO₂-selective hydrogen-bonded binary liquid absorbents under humid conditions.

pillar.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクス

authors: N. Kuroki, D. Kodama, Y. Suzuki, F. Chowdhury, H. Yamada, and H. Mori
title: Machine Learning Boosted Design of Ionic Liquids for CO₂ Absorption and Experimental Verification
journal: The Journal of Physical Chemistry B

summary.ja: 計算データと機械学習を用いてCO₂吸収用イオン液体を設計し、候補物質の性能を実験的に検証した。
summary.en: Machine-learning-driven ionic-liquid design for CO₂ absorption followed by experimental verification.

pillar.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクス

authors: F. Weber and H. Mori
title: On Donor–Acceptor-Bridging Intramolecular Hydrogen Bonds in NIR-TADF Molecules

summary.ja: 近赤外TADF分子に形成されるドナー–アクセプター架橋型分子内水素結合の構造と電子的役割を解析した。
summary.en: Analysis of donor–acceptor-bridging intramolecular hydrogen bonds in NIR-TADF molecules.

pillar.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクス

authors: N. Kuroki, Y. Mochizuki, and H. Mori
title: Practical Computational Chemistry Course for a Comprehensive Understanding of Organic, Inorganic, and Physical Chemistry: From Molecular Interactions to Chemical Reactions

summary.ja: 分子間相互作用から化学反応までを計算化学で扱い、有機・無機・物理化学を横断的に学ぶ教育プログラムを提案した。
summary.en: A practical computational chemistry course integrating organic, inorganic, and physical chemistry.

pillar.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクス

authors: N. Kuroki
title: 計算化学・機械学習による機能性液体の研究
journal: 理論化学会誌 フロンティア

summary.ja: 本質的に限りある実験データを計算化学と機械学習で補完し、機能性液体の物性理解と合理的設計につなげる研究を概説した。
summary.en: This study investigates 計算化学・機械学習による機能性液体の研究 using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

pillar.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクス

authors: Y. Suzuki, D. Kodama, H. Mori, N. Kuroki, F. Chowdhury, and H. Yamada
title: CO₂/Hydrocarbon Selectivity of Trihexyl(tetradecyl)phosphonium-Based Ionic Liquids

summary.ja: ホスホニウム系イオン液体へのCO₂および炭化水素の溶解性を評価し、ガス分離選択性を支配する要因を検討した。
summary.en: Evaluation of CO₂/hydrocarbon selectivity in phosphonium-based ionic liquids.

pillar.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクス

authors: N. Kuroki, Y. Uchino, T. Funakura, and H. Mori
title: Electronic Fluctuation in Physiological Solutions: Trimethylamine N-Oxide and tert-Butyl Alcohol

summary.ja: TMAOおよびtert-ブチルアルコール水溶液を対象に、溶液構造に伴って揺らぐ溶質・溶媒の電子状態を解析した。
summary.en: Electronic fluctuations in physiological solutions containing TMAO and tert-butyl alcohol.

pillar.ja: 複雑系量子化学

authors: K. Murata, H. Mori, and H. Fuwa
title: GIAO NMR Calculation-Driven Stereochemical Assignment of Marine Macrolide Natural Products: Assessment of the Performance of DP4 and DP4+ Analyses and Assignment of the Relative Configuration of Leptolyngbyalide A–C/Oscillariolide Macrolactone
journal: Bulletin of the Chemical Society of Japan

summary.ja: GIAO NMR計算とDP4／DP4+解析の信頼性を検証し、海洋マクロライド天然物の相対立体配置を帰属した。
summary.en: GIAO NMR and DP4/DP4+ analyses for stereochemical assignment of marine macrolide natural products.

pillar.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクス

authors: F. Weber and H. Mori
title: Machine-Learning Assisted Design Principle Search for Singlet Fission: An Example Study of Cibalackrot

summary.ja: 機械学習と量子化学計算を組み合わせ、シバラクロット誘導体におけるシングレットフィッション材料の設計原理を探索した。
summary.en: Machine-learning-assisted discovery of design principles for singlet-fission materials.

pillar.ja: 電子状態インフォマティクス

authors: N. Kuroki and H. Mori
title: Comprehensive Physical Chemistry Learning Based on Blended Learning: A New Laboratory Course

summary.ja: 反転学習用動画、クラウド計算環境、遠隔会議システムを組み合わせ、実験・量子化学計算・データ科学を横断的に学ぶ物理化学実験科目を構築した。
summary.en: This study investigates Comprehensive Physical Chemistry Learning Based on Blended Learning: A New Laboratory Course using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.ja: 量子化学とデータ科学の融合への転換期
historical_theme.en: Transition toward integrated quantum chemistry and data science

authors: R. Miyake, E. Suganuma, S. Kimura, H. Mori, J. Okabayashi, and T. Kusamoto
title: Cyclic Heterometallic Interactions Formed from a Flexible Tripeptide Complex Showing Effective Antiferromagnetic Spin Coupling

summary.ja: 柔軟なトリペプチド配位子が形成する異種金属環状構造を解析し、金属間の反強磁性的スピン結合を明らかにした。
summary.en: This study investigates Cyclic Heterometallic Interactions Formed from a Flexible Tripeptide Complex Showing Effective Antiferromagnetic Spin Coupling using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.ja: 量子化学とデータ科学の融合への転換期
historical_theme.en: Transition toward integrated quantum chemistry and data science

authors: K. Abe, A. Nakada, T. Matsumoto, D. Uchijyo, H. Mori, and H.-C. Chang
title: Functional-Group-Directed Photochemical Reactions of Aromatic Alcohols, Amines, and Thiols Triggered by Excited-State Hydrogen Detachment: Additive-Free Oligomerization, Disulfidation, and C(sp2)–H Carboxylation with CO₂

summary.ja: 励起状態での水素脱離を利用し、芳香族アルコール・アミン・チオールから添加剤なしで多様な光化学反応を誘起した。
summary.en: This study investigates Functional-Group-Directed Photochemical Reactions of Aromatic Alcohols, Amines, and Thiols Triggered by Excited-State Hydrogen Detachment: Additive-Free Oligomerization, Disulfidation, and C(sp2)–H Carboxylation with CO₂ using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.ja: 量子化学とデータ科学の融合への転換期
historical_theme.en: Transition toward integrated quantum chemistry and data science

authors: T. Ono, K. Kimura, M. Ihara, Y. Yamanaka, M. Sasaki, H. Mori, and Y. Hisaeda
title: Room-Temperature Phosphorescence Emitters Exhibiting Red to Near-Infrared Emission Derived from Intermolecular Charge-Transfer Triplet States of Naphthalenediimide–Halobenzoate Triad Molecules

summary.ja: 分子間電荷移動三重項状態を利用し、赤色から近赤外域に発光する室温リン光分子の設計原理を示した。
summary.en: This study investigates Room-Temperature Phosphorescence Emitters Exhibiting Red to Near-Infrared Emission Derived from Intermolecular Charge-Transfer Triplet States of Naphthalenediimide–Halobenzoate Triad Molecules using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.ja: 量子化学とデータ科学の融合への転換期
historical_theme.en: Transition toward integrated quantum chemistry and data science

authors: K. Urushibara, T. Yamada, A. Yokoyama, H. Mori, H. Masu, I. Azumaya, H. Kagechika, T. Yokozawa, and A. Tanatani
title: Development of Helical Aromatic Amide Foldamers with a Diphenylacetylene Backbone

summary.ja: ジフェニルアセチレン骨格をもつ芳香族アミドオリゴマーを合成し、安定なヘリカル構造を形成する要因を解析した。
summary.en: This study investigates Development of Helical Aromatic Amide Foldamers with a Diphenylacetylene Backbone using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.ja: 量子化学とデータ科学の融合への転換期
historical_theme.en: Transition toward integrated quantum chemistry and data science

authors: N. Kuroki, S. Maruyama, and H. Mori
title: Theoretical Strategy for Improving CO₂ Absorption of Mixed Ionic Liquids Focusing on the Anion Effect: A Comprehensive COSMO-RS Study

summary.ja: COSMO-RS計算により混合イオン液体のアニオン効果を系統的に評価し、CO₂吸収性能を向上させる設計指針を示した。
summary.en: This study investigates Theoretical Strategy for Improving CO₂ Absorption of Mixed Ionic Liquids Focusing on the Anion Effect: A Comprehensive COSMO-RS Study using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.en: Transition toward integrated quantum chemistry and data science

authors: N. Kuroki and H. Mori
title: Applicability of Effective Fragment Potential Version 2–Molecular Dynamics (EFP2-MD) Simulations for Predicting Dynamic Liquid Properties Including Supercritical Fluid Phase
journal: The Journal of Physical Chemistry B

summary.ja: EFP2-MD法を液体から超臨界流体まで適用し、拡散や動的物性を第一原理的に予測できる可能性を検証した。
summary.en: This study investigates Applicability of Effective Fragment Potential Version 2–Molecular Dynamics (EFP2-MD) Simulations for Predicting Dynamic Liquid Properties Including Supercritical Fluid Phase using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.ja: 量子化学とデータ科学の融合への転換期
historical_theme.en: Transition toward integrated quantum chemistry and data science

authors: C. Masuda and N. Kuroki
title: Statistical Thermodynamics Database Construction to Search for Novel Ionic Liquids with Gas Selectivity

summary.ja: COSMO-RS法により68,775種のイオン液体に対する15種類の気体のHenry定数を計算し、ガス分離材料探索のための第一原理データベースを構築するとともに、吸収能の予測にはイオンの幾何構造と電子状態の双方が重要であることを示した。
summary.en: This study investigates Statistical Thermodynamics Database Construction to Search for Novel Ionic Liquids with Gas Selectivity using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.en: Transition toward integrated quantum chemistry and data science

authors: K. Yamada, H. Mori, T. Sugaya, M. Tadokoro, J. Maeba, K. Nozaki, and M. Haga
title: Synthesis, X-ray Structure, Photophysical Properties, and Theoretical Studies of Six-Membered Cyclometalated Iridium(III) Complexes: Revisiting Ir(pnbi)2(acac)

summary.ja: 六員環シクロメタル化イリジウム錯体の構造と発光特性を、合成・結晶構造解析・量子化学計算から再検討した。
summary.en: This study investigates Synthesis, X-ray Structure, Photophysical Properties, and Theoretical Studies of Six-Membered Cyclometalated Iridium(III) Complexes: Revisiting Ir(pnbi)2(acac) using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

title: Applicability of Effective Fragment Potential Version 2–Molecular Dynamics (EFP2-MD) Simulations for Predicting Excess Properties of Mixed Solvents

summary.ja: EFP2-MD法を混合溶媒に適用し、過剰体積や過剰エンタルピーなどの非理想混合物性の再現性を検証した。
summary.en: This study investigates Applicability of Effective Fragment Potential Version 2–Molecular Dynamics (EFP2-MD) Simulations for Predicting Excess Properties of Mixed Solvents using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

authors: Y. Tojo, K. Urushibara, S. Yamamoto, H. Mori, H. Masu, M. Kudo, T. Hirano, I. Azumaya, H. Kagechika, and A. Tanatani
title: Conformational Properties of Aromatic Oligoamides Bearing Pyrrole Rings

summary.ja: ピロール環を含む芳香族オリゴアミドの配座特性を解析し、分子内相互作用が折りたたみ構造に与える影響を示した。
summary.en: This study investigates Conformational Properties of Aromatic Oligoamides Bearing Pyrrole Rings using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

title: Stereoselective Interactions as Revealed by Vibrational Circular Dichroism: Interplay of Chiral Metal Complexes Co-adsorbed in a Montmorillonite Clay

summary.ja: モンモリロナイト粘土上に共吸着したキラル金属錯体間の立体選択的相互作用を、振動円二色性と計算から解明した。
summary.en: This study investigates Stereoselective Interactions as Revealed by Vibrational Circular Dichroism: Interplay of Chiral Metal Complexes Co-adsorbed in a Montmorillonite Clay using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

title: Synthesis and Conformational Analysis of Alternately N-Alkylated Aromatic Amide Oligomers

summary.ja: 交互にN-アルキル化した芳香族アミドオリゴマーを合成し、置換様式による配座制御の機構を解析した。
summary.en: This study investigates Synthesis and Conformational Analysis of Alternately N-Alkylated Aromatic Amide Oligomers using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

authors: K. Miyazaki and H. Mori
title: Origin of High Oxygen Reduction Reaction Activity of Pt₁₂ and Strategy to Obtain Better Catalyst Using Subnanosized Pt-Alloy Clusters

summary.ja: Pt₁₂クラスターの高い酸素還元活性の電子的起源を明らかにし、サブナノ合金クラスターによる高活性触媒設計を提案した。
summary.en: This study investigates Origin of High Oxygen Reduction Reaction Activity of Pt₁₂ and Strategy to Obtain Better Catalyst Using Subnanosized Pt-Alloy Clusters using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

summary.ja: EFP2-MD法をイオン液体へ適用し、分極や分子間相互作用を考慮した溶液構造解析の有効性を示した。
summary.en: This study investigates Effective Fragment Potential Version 2–Molecular Dynamics (EFP2-MD) Simulation for Investigating Solution Structures of Ionic Liquids using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

title: Theoretical Study on Crystal-Facet Dependency of Hydrogen Storage Rate for Shape-Controlled Pd Nanoparticles

summary.ja: 形状制御パラジウムナノ粒子における水素吸蔵速度の結晶面依存性を解析し、表面構造と反応性の関係を示した。
summary.en: This study investigates Theoretical Study on Crystal-Facet Dependency of Hydrogen Storage Rate for Shape-Controlled Pd Nanoparticles using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

title: Fragment Molecular Orbital-Based Molecular Dynamics Study on Hydrated Ln(III) Ions

summary.ja: FMO-MD法により水和ランタノイド三価イオンの溶媒和構造と動的挙動を解析した。
summary.en: This study investigates Fragment Molecular Orbital-Based Molecular Dynamics Study on Hydrated Ln(III) Ions using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

summary.ja: ラジウム二価イオンの水和構造を量子化学的に解析し、他のアルカリ土類金属イオンとの違いを比較した。
summary.en: This study investigates A Quantum Chemical Study on Hydration of Ra(II): Comparison with the Other Hydrated Divalent Alkaline Earth Metal Ions using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

authors: M. Tanaka and H. Mori
title: Electronic Structures of Platinum(II) Complexes with 2-Arylpyridine and 1,3-Diketonate Ligands: A Relativistic Density Functional Study on Photoexcitation and Phosphorescent Properties
journal: The Journal of Physical Chemistry C

summary.ja: 白金(II)錯体の励起状態とリン光特性を相対論的DFT計算で解析し、配位子構造と発光特性の関係を示した。
summary.en: This study investigates Electronic Structures of Platinum(II) Complexes with 2-Arylpyridine and 1,3-Diketonate Ligands: A Relativistic Density Functional Study on Photoexcitation and Phosphorescent Properties using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

authors: E. Miyoshi, H. Mori, R. Hirayama, Y. Osanai, T. Noro, H. Honda, and M. Klobukowski
title: Compact and efficient basis sets of s- and p-block elements for model core potential method

summary.ja: モデルコアポテンシャル法に適した典型元素用のコンパクトな基底関数を開発し、精度と計算効率を両立した。
summary.en: This study investigates Compact and efficient basis sets of s- and p-block elements for model core potential method using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.ja: モデル内殻ポテンシャルと基底関数
historical_theme.en: Model core potentials and basis sets

authors: H. Mori and E. Miyoshi
title: Possibility of molecular-switch with controlled hydrogen bond: Utility of combination of 2,2′-biimidazole and redox-active ligand
journal: Journal of Theoretical and Computational Chemistry

summary.ja: 2,2′-ビイミダゾールと酸化還元活性配位子を組み合わせ、水素結合で制御される分子スイッチの可能性を示した。
summary.en: This study investigates Possibility of molecular-switch with controlled hydrogen bond: Utility of combination of 2,2′-biimidazole and redox-active ligand using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.ja: 電子状態理論と分子スイッチ
historical_theme.en: Electronic-structure theory and molecular switching

authors: T. Tsutsui, X. Liu, Y. Hirayama, N. Katahira, H. Mori, M. Kondo, and E. Miyoshi
title: ハイドロキシフェニルベンズオキサゾール誘導体亜鉛錯体の薄膜構造についての再考察
journal: 有機EL討論会第一回例会論文集

summary.ja: 量子化学計算を用いて、有機EL用亜鉛錯体が薄膜中と溶液中で異なる会合状態をとり、二量体または単量体として安定化される可能性を示した。
summary.en: This study investigates ハイドロキシフェニルベンズオキサゾール誘導体亜鉛錯体の薄膜構造についての再考察 using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.ja: 発光材料の電子状態設計
historical_theme.en: Electronic-structure design of luminescent materials

authors: M. Kondo, H. Mori, and E. Miyoshi
title: 有機EL亜鉛錯体の密度汎関数法による理論研究
journal: 有機EL討論会第二回例会論文集

summary.ja: DFT計算により、有機EL用亜鉛錯体の単量体・二量体構造と電子状態を比較し、周囲の環境による会合状態の変化を解析した。
summary.en: This study investigates 有機EL亜鉛錯体の密度汎関数法による理論研究 using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.ja: 発光材料の電子状態設計
historical_theme.en: Electronic-structure design of luminescent materials

authors: H. Mori, M. Kondo, X. Liu, Y. Hirayama, N. Katahira, T. Tsutsui, and E. Miyoshi
title: 溶媒効果と置換基の立体障害による有機EL材料の電子構造変化―量子化学計算で見る2-(o-hydroxyphenyl)benzoxazole Zn錯体の幾何構造―
journal: 有機EL討論会第一回例会論文集

summary.ja: 溶媒効果と置換基の立体障害が、有機EL用亜鉛錯体の単量体・二量体平衡と電子状態に及ぼす影響を量子化学的に解析した。
summary.en: This study investigates 溶媒効果と置換基の立体障害による有機EL材料の電子構造変化―量子化学計算で見る2-(o-hydroxyphenyl)benzoxazole Zn錯体の幾何構造― using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.ja: 発光材料の電子状態設計
historical_theme.en: Electronic-structure design of luminescent materials

authors: H. Mori and E. Miyoshi
title: The hydrogen bond of the one-dimensional assembled complex [Ni(2,2′-biimidazole)₂]: The effect of transition metals on the hydrogen bond
journal: Bulletin of the Chemical Society of Japan

summary.ja: 一次元ニッケル錯体の水素結合構造を解析し、遷移金属中心が水素結合強度と電子状態に与える影響を示した。
summary.en: This study investigates The hydrogen bond of the one-dimensional assembled complex [Ni(2,2′-biimidazole)₂]: The effect of transition metals on the hydrogen bond using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.ja: 水素結合と分子集合体の電子状態
historical_theme.en: Electronic structure of hydrogen-bonded molecular assemblies

authors: H. Mori and E. Miyoshi
title: Theoretical design of a new optical durable molecular switch

summary.ja: 光照射後も状態を保持できる分子スイッチを理論設計し、水素結合と金属錯体の電子状態変換を利用する原理を提案した。
summary.en: This study investigates Theoretical design of a new optical durable molecular switch using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.ja: 電子状態理論と分子スイッチ
historical_theme.en: Electronic-structure theory and molecular switching

authors: H. Mori, H. Sekiya, E. Miyoshi, K. Mogi, and Y. Sakai
title: Effects of intermolecular interaction on proton tunneling: Theoretical study on two-dimensional potential energy surfaces for 9-hydroxyphenalenone–CO₂/H₂O complexes

summary.ja: 9-ヒドロキシフェナレノンとCO₂／H₂Oの錯形成がプロトントンネルポテンシャルに及ぼす影響を二次元ポテンシャル面から解析した。
summary.en: This study investigates Effects of intermolecular interaction on proton tunneling: Theoretical study on two-dimensional potential energy surfaces for 9-hydroxyphenalenone–CO₂/H₂O complexes using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.en: Intermolecular interactions and proton tunneling

authors: E. Miyoshi, T. Iura, Y. Sakai, H. Tochihara, S. Tanaka, and H. Mori
title: Molecular orbital study for Na, Mg, and Al adsorption on the Si(111) surface

summary.ja: Si(111)表面へのNa、Mg、Al吸着を分子軌道計算で比較し、金属種による結合様式と電子構造の違いを示した。
summary.en: This study investigates Molecular orbital study for Na, Mg, and Al adsorption on the Si(111) surface using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.en: Electronic structure of surfaces and interfaces

authors: N. Otsubo, C. Okabe, H. Mori, K. Sakota, K. Amimoto, T. Kawato, and H. Sekiya
title: Excited-state intramolecular proton transfer in photochromic jet-cooled N-salicylideneaniline
journal: Journal of Photochemistry and Photobiology A: Chemistry

summary.ja: ジェット冷却N-サリチリデンアニリンの励起状態分子内プロトン移動を分光実験と理論計算から解析した。
summary.en: This study investigates Excited-state intramolecular proton transfer in photochromic jet-cooled N-salicylideneaniline using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.en: Molecular spectroscopy and excited-state proton transfer

authors: H. Mori, J. Furusawa, and H. Sekiya
title: Experimental and theoretical study on proton tunneling in jet-cooled 9-hydroxyphenalenone–CO₂ van der Waals complex
journal: Bulletin of the Polish Academy of Sciences: Chemistry

summary.ja: ジェット冷却錯体の分光測定と理論計算を組み合わせ、CO₂との相互作用がプロトントンネル運動に及ぼす影響を明らかにした。
summary.en: This study investigates Experimental and theoretical study on proton tunneling in jet-cooled 9-hydroxyphenalenone–CO₂ van der Waals complex using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.en: Molecular spectroscopy and proton tunneling

authors: H. Mori, H. Kugisaki, Y. Inokuchi, N. Nishi, E. Miyoshi, K. Sakota, K. Ohashi, and H. Sekiya
title: LIF and IR dip spectra of jet-cooled p-aminophenol–M (M = CO, N₂): Hydrogen-bonded or van der Waals-bonded structure?
journal: The Journal of Physical Chemistry A

summary.ja: p-アミノフェノールとCOまたはN₂の錯体について、分光測定と計算から水素結合型かvan der Waals型かを判定した。
summary.en: This study investigates LIF and IR dip spectra of jet-cooled p-aminophenol–M (M = CO, N₂): Hydrogen-bonded or van der Waals-bonded structure? using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

title: Structure and intermolecular hydrogen bond of jet-cooled p-aminophenol–(H₂O)₁ studied by electronic and IR-dip spectroscopy and density functional theory calculations

summary.ja: p-アミノフェノール–水錯体の構造と分子間水素結合を、電子・赤外分光とDFT計算から決定した。
summary.en: This study investigates Structure and intermolecular hydrogen bond of jet-cooled p-aminophenol–(H₂O)₁ studied by electronic and IR-dip spectroscopy and density functional theory calculations using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

historical_theme.en: Molecular spectroscopy and weak intermolecular interactions

title: Theoretical study of interactions between the Si(111) surface and metal atoms

summary.ja: Si(111)表面と金属原子の相互作用を理論解析し、吸着構造と表面電子状態の関係を検討した。
summary.en: This study investigates Theoretical study of interactions between the Si(111) surface and metal atoms using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.

summary.en: This study investigates Theoretical study on proton tunneling potential of 9-hydroxyphenalenone–CO₂ complex using theoretical, computational, or experimental approaches as appropriate.
